commands.name: Flush DNS Cache
commands.target: osascript -e 'do shell script "dscacheutil -flushcache; killall -HUP mDNSResponder" with administrator privileges'
commands.description: Flush the macOS DNS cache to resolve stale lookups

commands.name: Show My IP
commands.target: osascript -e 'tell app "Terminal" to do script "curl -s ifconfig.me && echo"'
commands.description: Display your current public IP address in Terminal

commands.name: Show Local IP
commands.target: osascript -e 'tell app "Terminal" to do script "ipconfig getifaddr en0"'
commands.description: Show your local network IP address (en0)

commands.name: Ping Google
commands.target: osascript -e 'tell app "Terminal" to do script "ping -c 5 google.com"'
commands.description: Ping google.com 5 times to check internet connectivity

commands.name: Network Diagnostics
commands.description: Open the macOS Network Diagnostics utility
